fields.name: Kingsmill Soft White Bread Medium Sliced Loaf 800g
fields.description:
Soft & Fluffy Texture
Source of Plant Protein
Kosher - SKA
Halal
Suitable for Vegetarians and Vegans
Additional Pack Information
® "Kingsmill" is a Registered Trade Mark of ABF Grain Products Ltd.
Product Marketing
Make super soft sandwiches or enjoy a delicious slice of toast with your morning cuppa using our Soft White Bread Loaf. With its light, fluffy texture and mild flavour, it’s the perfect everyday white bread loaf for the whole family. Whether you’re making a quick lunch, a tasty snack, or classic toast for breakfast, this soft white medium-sliced loaf delivers on taste and quality in every slice. Great for packed lunches, weekend brunches or a simple slice with butter; it pairs well with any topping. Choose our Soft White Bread for a versatile, reliable medium-sliced bread option that’s ideal for sandwiches and toast alike.

fields.name: Kingsmill Tasty Wholemeal Bread Medium Sliced Loaf 800g
fields.description:
High in Fibre
Source of Plant Protein
Suitable for vegetarians and vegans
Halal
Kosher - SKA
Additional Pack Information
® "KINGSMILL" is a Registered Trade Mark of ABF Grain Products Ltd.
Product Marketing
Kingsmill Tasty Wholemeal is high in fibre, low in sugar and fat. Available in Thick and Medium sliced.
Enjoy a slice of Kingsmill Tasty Wholemeal Bread. Perfect for sandwiches or toast, it has a soft texture and a distinctive, nutty flavour the whole family can enjoy. Made with 100% wholegrain flour and kibbled malted wheat, this wholemeal loaf is high in fibre and low in sugar and fat. It’s a smart everyday choice that doesn’t compromise on taste. Whether you’re making a packed lunch or having a slice of toast with your morning cuppa, a Kingsmill Tasty Wholemeal Loaf fits right in. Full of flavour, it’s a great way to support your everyday food choices while enjoying the bread you love.

A scrumptious blend of seeds including toasted brown linseeds, toasted sunflower, pumpkin, golden linseeds, millet and poppy seeds giving an unmistakeable flavour and texture.
Hovis® Seed Sensations® bread, which typically contains 10:0g protein per 100g or approximately 14% of the energy value, is a source of protein which contributes to the maintenance of muscle mass if eaten as part of a healthy lifestyle & balanced diet.

fields.name: Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewell Tarts 6 Pack
fields.description:
Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewells
Bakewell tarts with soft icing and a hand-placed cherry on top
The nation's favourite cherry Bakewell*
100% natural flavours
Sharing-ready pack of six
*Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewells are the No.1 best-selling Cherry Bakewells. Source: IRI Grocery Outlets Market Data for Great Britain, 52 weeks up to and including w/e 21.11.20
Additional Pack Information
Mr Kipling trade marks, designs and logos appearing on this pack are owned by the Premier Foods Group.
Product Marketing
Sometimes it's the simple moments that bring the greatest pleasure, like the first bite of our deliciously tempting Cherry Bakewells. One of Mr Kipling's best-loved recipes, these sponge cake tarts are made using delicately light pastry with a layer of juicy plum and raspberry jam and a sweet frangipane sponge. They contain 100% natural flavours, with no artificial colours in sight. Each of these frangipane tarts is topped with soft fondant icing and finished off with a signature cherry on top. Our Bakewell tarts make the perfect tea time treat, lunchtime snack or a well-deserved reward at the end of the day. A classic favourite loved by generations and the nation's favourite*,Because it's the little things that mean the most, like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling.
*Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewells are the No.1 best-selling Cherry Bakewells. Source: IRI Grocery Outlets Market Data for Great Britain, 52 weeks up to and including w/e 21.11.20

fields.name: Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pies 6 Pack
fields.description:
Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pies
The Nation's Favourite Apple Pie*
100% natural flavours & no artificial colours
No hydrogenated fat
Suitable for vegetarians
Additional Pack Information
Mr Kipling trade marks, designs and logos appearing on this pack are owned by the Premier Foods Group.
Product Marketing
Make your day a little sweeter with a Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pie. Each one is made with the care and quality that makes us the nation's favourite apple pie*. Inside a case of melt-in-the-mouth shortcrust pastry, there's a fruity filling packed with juicy Bramley apple chunks. Each pie is made with 100% natural flavours and no hydrogenated fat or artificial colours, for a great tasting apple pie that's sure to hit the spot. Our six-pack is perfect for serving as a dessert for the whole family. Why not serve warm with a dollop of custard or enjoy with a comforting cup of tea in the afternoon? Here at Mr Kipling, we're big believers in the joy of everyday moments. Make time to grab a few minutes to yourself and savour the unmistakable taste of an exceedingly good Mr Kipling Apple Pie.
*Mr Kipling Apple Pies are the No. 1 best-selling Apple Pies. Source: IRI Grocery Outlets, Market Data for Great Britain, 52 weeks up to and including w/e 26.02.22

fields.name: Mr Kipling Angel Slices Cakes 6 Pack
fields.description:
Layers of pink and yellow sponge cake layered with a vanilla flavour filling and icing
Made with 100% natural flavours
No artificial colours
Contains 6 cake slices, split into 3x twin packs
On-the-go friendly; pack a twinpack for a treat on the go or in your lunchbox
Mr Kipling is the No.1 cake brand in the UK
Additional Pack Information
Mr Kipling trade marks, designs and logos appearing on this pack are owned by the Premier Foods Group.
Product Marketing
Treat yourself to the irresistible charm of Mr Kipling Angel Cake Slices! Enjoy delightful layers of yellow and pink sponge cake, sandwiched with a heavenly vanilla flavour filling, and topped with luscious icing for the perfect finishing touch.
Each delicious Angel Cake Slice is crafted with 100% natural flavours, no hydrogenated fat and no artificial colours, creating a great tasting cake slice that's sure to hit the spot. These exceedingly good cakes truly are a heavenly snack with a nostalgic charm.
This pack contains 6 indulgent cake slices, with 3 twin packs making each delightful small cake perfectly sized for any occasion. These Mr Kipling Angel Cake Slices are ideal for lunchboxes and on-the-go, sharing some cake with friends and family, or simply enjoying alongside a well-deserved cup of tea. Exceedingly good, effortlessly delicious.
Why not explore more from the Mr Kipling range? Try our iconic Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pies.
Brand Marketing
It's the little things that mean the most like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling.

fields.name: Mr Kipling Manor House Cake 390g
fields.description:
Mr Kipling Manor House Cake
Sponge cake baked with sultanas
100% natural flavours
Suitable for vegetarians
Serves 8 – a delicious and convenient dessert

#exceedinglygood
@mrkiplingcakes
Product Marketing
Mr Kipling's Manor House cake is a melt-in-the-mouth, golden sponge cake that's baked with juicy sultanas and dusted with demerara sugar. This traditional sponge cake serves eight, making it a delicious and convenient go-to for family desserts, get-togethers with friends or taking into the office for celebrations with colleagues. The rich flavours pair perfectly with ice cream or even yoghurt for dessert, or you can simply take a slice to enjoy with a cup of tea in the afternoon. Plus, this cake is suitable for vegetarians and ready to serve, so it's a simple and convenient treat for everyone to enjoy when friends are coming over. It's the little things that mean the most, like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling!

fields.name: Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewell Tarts 6 Pack
fields.description:
Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewells
Bakewell tarts with soft icing and a hand-placed cherry on top
The nation's favourite cherry Bakewell*
100% natural flavours
Sharing-ready pack of six
*Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewells are the No.1 best-selling Cherry Bakewells. Source: IRI Grocery Outlets Market Data for Great Britain, 52 weeks up to and including w/e 21.11.20
Additional Pack Information
Mr Kipling trade marks, designs and logos appearing on this pack are owned by the Premier Foods Group.
Product Marketing
Sometimes it's the simple moments that bring the greatest pleasure, like the first bite of our deliciously tempting Cherry Bakewells. One of Mr Kipling's best-loved recipes, these sponge cake tarts are made using delicately light pastry with a layer of juicy plum and raspberry jam and a sweet frangipane sponge. They contain 100% natural flavours, with no artificial colours in sight. Each of these frangipane tarts is topped with soft fondant icing and finished off with a signature cherry on top. Our Bakewell tarts make the perfect tea time treat, lunchtime snack or a well-deserved reward at the end of the day. A classic favourite loved by generations and the nation's favourite*,Because it's the little things that mean the most, like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling.
*Mr Kipling Cherry Bakewells are the No.1 best-selling Cherry Bakewells. Source: IRI Grocery Outlets Market Data for Great Britain, 52 weeks up to and including w/e 21.11.20
Brand Marketing
It's the little things that mean the most like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling

fields.name: Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pies 6 Pack
fields.description:
Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pies
The Nation's Favourite Apple Pie*
100% natural flavours & no artificial colours
No hydrogenated fat
Suitable for vegetarians
Additional Pack Information
Mr Kipling trade marks, designs and logos appearing on this pack are owned by the Premier Foods Group.
Product Marketing
Make your day a little sweeter with a Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pie. Each one is made with the care and quality that makes us the nation's favourite apple pie*. Inside a case of melt-in-the-mouth shortcrust pastry, there's a fruity filling packed with juicy Bramley apple chunks. Each pie is made with 100% natural flavours and no hydrogenated fat or artificial colours, for a great tasting apple pie that's sure to hit the spot. Our six-pack is perfect for serving as a dessert for the whole family. Why not serve warm with a dollop of custard or enjoy with a comforting cup of tea in the afternoon? Here at Mr Kipling, we're big believers in the joy of everyday moments. Make time to grab a few minutes to yourself and savour the unmistakable taste of an exceedingly good Mr Kipling Apple Pie.
*Mr Kipling Apple Pies are the No. 1 best-selling Apple Pies. Source: IRI Grocery Outlets, Market Data for Great Britain, 52 weeks up to and including w/e 26.02.22
Brand Marketing
The Nation's Favourite Apple Pie*

fields.name: Mr Kipling Angel Slices Cakes 6 Pack
fields.description:
Layers of pink and yellow sponge cake layered with a vanilla flavour filling and icing
Made with 100% natural flavours
No artificial colours
Contains 6 cake slices, split into 3x twin packs
On-the-go friendly; pack a twinpack for a treat on the go or in your lunchbox
Mr Kipling is the No.1 cake brand in the UK
Additional Pack Information
Mr Kipling trade marks, designs and logos appearing on this pack are owned by the Premier Foods Group.
Product Marketing
Treat yourself to the irresistible charm of Mr Kipling Angel Cake Slices! Enjoy delightful layers of yellow and pink sponge cake, sandwiched with a heavenly vanilla flavour filling, and topped with luscious icing for the perfect finishing touch.
Each delicious Angel Cake Slice is crafted with 100% natural flavours, no hydrogenated fat and no artificial colours, creating a great tasting cake slice that's sure to hit the spot. These exceedingly good cakes truly are a heavenly snack with a nostalgic charm.
This pack contains 6 indulgent cake slices, with 3 twin packs making each delightful small cake perfectly sized for any occasion. These Mr Kipling Angel Cake Slices are ideal for lunchboxes and on-the-go, sharing some cake with friends and family, or simply enjoying alongside a well-deserved cup of tea. Exceedingly good, effortlessly delicious.
Why not explore more from the Mr Kipling range? Try our iconic Mr Kipling Bramley Apple Pies.
Brand Marketing
It's the little things that mean the most like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling.

fields.name: Mr Kipling Manor House Cake 390g
fields.description:

Sponge cake baked with sultanas
100% natural flavours
Suitable for vegetarians
Serves 8 – a delicious and convenient dessert

#exceedinglygood
@mrkiplingcakes
Product Marketing
Mr Kipling's Manor House cake is a melt-in-the-mouth, golden sponge cake that's baked with juicy sultanas and dusted with demerara sugar. This traditional sponge cake serves eight, making it a delicious and convenient go-to for family desserts, get-togethers with friends or taking into the office for celebrations with colleagues. The rich flavours pair perfectly with ice cream or even yoghurt for dessert, or you can simply take a slice to enjoy with a cup of tea in the afternoon. Plus, this cake is suitable for vegetarians and ready to serve, so it's a simple and convenient treat for everyone to enjoy when friends are coming over. It's the little things that mean the most, like an exceedingly good cake from Mr Kipling!

Serve warm or cold
Heating instructions:
Conventional gas & electric ovens: Preheat oven to 180°C (gas mark 4). Fan-assisted electric ovens: Preheat oven to 160°C. Remove all packaging. Place a slice of cake (1/8th of a cake/approx 25g) on a shallow baking tray and heat on the middle shelf of the oven for 5 minutes. If heating more than 1 slice do not overlap. All cooking appliances vary. This is a guide only.

Serve warm or cold
Heating instructions:
Conventional gas & electric ovens: Preheat oven to 180°C (gas mark 4). Fan-assisted electric ovens: Preheat oven to 160°C. Remove all packaging. Place a slice of cake (1/8th of a cake/approx 25g) on a shallow baking tray and heat on the middle shelf of the oven for 5 minutes. If heating more than 1 slice do not overlap. All cooking appliances vary. This is a guide only.

fields.name: Starbucks Frappuccino Caramel Flavoured Milk Iced Coffee 250ml
fields.description:
Starbucks Frappuccino® Caramel iced coffee is inspired by a true Starbucks coffeehouse original.
A delicious blend of our signature espresso roast coffee, creamy milk and buttery caramel.
An indulgent chilled coffee blend, a perfect treat which can be consumed anywhere: at home or on the go.
To enjoy our delicious Starbucks Frappuccino® Caramel iced coffee at its best, serve it chilled or over the ice and gently shake to wake the flavours.
Be sure to look out for our other indulgent Starbucks Frappuccino® chilled coffee flavours: Mocha, Coffee, Vanilla.
Starbucks®?coffees?are made with 100%?arabica?coffee and verified as responsibly?sourced by Coffee and Farmer Equity (C.A.F.E.) Practices. Developed in collaboration with Conservation International, C.A.F.E Practices is a veri-fication program that measures farms against economic, social and environmental criteria. For more details please visit: https://stories.starbucks.com/press/2020/cafe-practices-starbucks-approach-to-ethically-sourcing-coffee/
Committed to 100% ethical coffee sourcing in partnership with conservation international.
starbucks.com/social-impact
Additional Pack Information
© 2025 Starbucks Corporation.
Product Marketing
Happiness in a bottle, Starbucks Frappuccino® Caramel iced coffee is inspired by a true Starbucks coffeehouse original. It's a delicious blend of our signature espresso roast coffee, creamy milk and buttery caramel. An indulgent chilled coffee blend, a perfect treat which can be consumed anywhere: at home or on the go.
To enjoy our delicious Starbucks Frappuccino® Caramel iced coffee at its best, serve it chilled or over the ice and gently shake to wake the flavours. Be sure to look out for our other indulgent Starbucks Frappuccino® chilled coffee flavours: Mocha, Coffee, Vanilla.
Starbucks is completely passionate about coffee, going to great lengths to get the best taste in every cup and achieve the best coffee flavour. Starbucks®?coffees?are made with 100%?arabica?coffee and our commitment to ethical coffee sourcing remains a priority through our Coffee and Farmer Equity?(C.A.F.E) Practices program.
C.A.F.E Practices has been the cornerstone of our ethical sourcing approach to buying and selling coffee since 2004. Developed in collaboration with Conservation International, C.A.F.E Practices is a verification program that measures farms against economic, social and environmental criteria, all designed to promote transparent profitable and sustainable coffee growing practices while also protecting the well-being of coffee farmers and workers, their families and their communities. For more details please visit: https://stories.starbucks.com/press/2020/cafe-practices-starbucks-approach-to-ethically-sourcing-coffee/

fields.name: Starbucks Tripleshot Espresso Iced Coffee 300ml
fields.description:
Sterilised
Starbucks Tripleshot ™ Espresso iced coffee is inspired by a true Starbucks coffeehouse original.
It's simply made with not one, not two, but THREE bold shots of our signature espresso and smooth creamy milk.
Provides a coffee kick whenever you need a triple uplift.
A perfect way to kick start your day or to keep you going through a busy day.
To enjoy Starbucks Tripleshot ™ Espresso iced coffee at its best serve it chilled or over the ice and gently shake to wake the flavours.
For a lighter way to get your chilled coffee kick, try Starbucks Tripleshot™ Espresso No Added Sugar.
Starbucks®?coffees?are made with 100%?arabica?coffee and verified as responsibly?sourced by Coffee and Farmer Equity (C.A.F.E.) Practices. Developed in collaboration with Conservation International, C.A.F.E Practices is a veri-fication program that measures farms against economic, social and environmental criteria. For more details please visit: https://stories.starbucks.com/press/2020/cafe-practices-starbucks-approach-to-ethically-sourcing-coffee/
Committed to 100% Ethical Coffee Sourcing in partnership with Conservation International.

Starbucks Tripleshot ™ Espresso is inspired by a true Starbucks coffeehouse original. It's simply made with not one, not two, but THREE bold shots of our signature espresso and smooth creamy milk, providing a coffee kick whenever you need a triple uplift; a perfect way to kick start your day or to keep you going through a busy day.
To enjoy Starbucks Tripleshot ™ Espresso iced coffee at its best serve it chilled or over the ice and gently shake to wake the flavours. And for a lighter way to get your chilled coffee kick, why not try Starbucks Tripleshot™ Espresso No Added Sugar?

fields.name: Starbucks Frappuccino Mocha Chocolate Flavoured Milk Iced Coffee 250ml
fields.description:
Starbucks Frappuccino® Mocha iced coffee is inspired by a true Starbucks coffeehouse original.
A delicious blend of our signature espresso roast coffee, creamy milk with rich chocolatey flavour.
An indulgent chilled coffee blend, a perfect treat which can be consumed anywhere: at home or on the go.
To enjoy our delicious Starbucks Frappuccino® Mocha iced coffee at its best, serve it chilled or over the ice and gently shake to wake the flavours.
Be sure to look out for our other indulgent Starbucks Frappuccino® chilled coffee flavours: Coffee, Caramel, Vanilla.
Starbucks®?coffees?are made with 100%?arabica?coffee and verified as responsibly?sourced by Coffee and Farmer Equity (C.A.F.E.) Practices. Developed in collaboration with Conservation International, C.A.F.E Practices is a veri-fication program that measures farms against economic, social and environmental criteria. For more details please visit: https://stories.starbucks.com/press/2020/cafe-practices-starbucks-approach-to-ethically-sourcing-coffee/
Committed to 100% Ethical Coffee Sourcing in partnership with Conservation International.
starbucks.com/social-impact
Additional Pack Information
© 2025 Starbucks Corporation
Product Marketing
Happiness in a bottle, Starbucks Frappuccino® Mocha iced coffee is inspired by a true Starbucks coffeehouse original. It's a delicious blend of our signature espresso roast coffee, creamy milk with rich chocolatey flavour. An indulgent chilled coffee blend, a perfect treat which can be consumed anywhere: at home or on the go.
To enjoy our delicious Starbucks Frappuccino® Mocha iced coffee at its best, serve it chilled or over the ice and gently shake to wake the flavours. Be sure to look out for our other indulgent Starbucks Frappuccino® chilled coffee flavours: Coffee, Caramel, Vanilla.
Starbucks is completely passionate about coffee, going to great lengths to get the best taste in every cup and achieve the best coffee flavour. Starbucks®?coffees?are made with 100%?arabica?coffee and our commitment to ethical coffee sourcing remains a priority through our Coffee and Farmer Equity?(C.A.F.E) Practices program.
C.A.F.E Practices has been the cornerstone of our ethical sourcing approach to buying and selling coffee since 2004. Developed in collaboration with Conservation International, C.A.F.E Practices is a verification program that measures farms against economic, social and environmental criteria, all designed to promote transparent profitable and sustainable coffee growing practices while also protecting the well-being of coffee farmers and workers, their families and their communities. For more details please visit: https://stories.starbucks.com/press/2020/cafe-practices-starbucks-approach-to-ethically-sourcing-coffee/

fields.name: La Famiglia Rana Spinach and Ricotta 250g
fields.description:
Fresh filled pasta in minutes
Filled with vibrant ingredients
Delicious and authentic Italian fresh filled pasta
Additional Pack Information
Product packaged in a protective atmosphere.
V-Label International - Vegetarian, V-LABEL.COM
FSC - FSC® Mix, Packaging from responsible sources, FSC® C136152, www.fsc.org
Product Marketing
Fresh tortelloni parcels filled with creamy ricotta and chopped, tender pieces of spinach. They go beautifully with fresh sweet peas, tender leeks, and a touch of mint. Simple, vibrant, and tasty. Alternatively, for a quick and easy burst of flavour, try it with our Basil Pesto.
Brand Marketing
LIVE LIFE GENEROUSLY
Verona has been the heart and home of La Famiglia Rana since 1962, where our story began crafting pasta with the same love, care and passion found in kitchens across Italy. We create perfect pasta parcels filled with carefully selected vibrant ingredients that are chopped never blitzed, to deliver a unique taste experience. For us, it's more than food: it's how we share love, bring people together, and live life generously every day.

fields.name: La Famiglia Rana Sundried Tomato and Pecorino Cheese Fresh Sauce 200g
fields.description:
Perfect with Fresh Filled Pasta
Perfect with our Spinach & Ricotta Tortelloni
Product Marketing
Sundried Tomato and Pecorino Cheese Sauce
This rich, fragrant sauce is made with plump Italian tomatoes and sundried tomatoes to bring out all their bittersweet flavour, then loosely chopped and blended with delicious Pecorino cheese. Heat and stir into our Spinach & Ricotta fresh tortelloni and finish with a leaf or two of fresh basil for a taste of la vera Italia.
Brand Marketing
Live Life Generously
Our family has been making fresh pasta for Italian dinner tables since 1962 in our home in Verona. Now, we present the perfect accompaniment, our Fresh Sauces. Specially made to complement our fresh pasta, our sauces are lovingly prepared with carefully selected ingredients, each of which is perfectly cooked to bring you its full flavour and ideal texture.

fields.name: La Famiglia Rana Prosciutto Cotto and Mozzarella 250g
fields.description:
Fresh filled pasta in minutes
Filled with vibrant ingredients
Delicious and authentic Italian fresh filled pasta
Additional Pack Information
Product packaged in a protective atmosphere.
FSC - FSC® Mix, Packaging from responsible sources, FSC® C136152, www.fsc.org
Product Marketing
Fresh tortelloni parcels filled with tender mozzarella and chopped, succulent pieces of ham. We suggest serving with sweet cherry tomatoes, soft courgettes, red onion and a handful of olives. Or for an effortless meal, simply add our Tomato & Mascarpone sauce
Brand Marketing
LIVE LIFE GENEROUSLY
Verona has been the heart and home of La Famiglia Rana since 1962, where our story began crafting pasta with the same love, care and passion found in kitchens across Italy. We create perfect pasta parcels filled with carefully selected vibrant ingredients that are chopped never blitzed, to deliver a unique taste experience. For us, it's more than food: it's how we share love, bring people together, and live life generously every day.

fields.name: La Famiglia Rana Sundried Tomato and Pecorino Cheese Fresh Sauce 200g
fields.description:
Perfect with Fresh Filled Pasta
Perfect with our Spinach & Ricotta Tortelloni
Product Marketing
Sundried Tomato and Pecorino Cheese Sauce
This rich, fragrant sauce is made with plump Italian tomatoes and sundried tomatoes to bring out all their bittersweet flavour, then loosely chopped and blended with delicious Pecorino cheese. Heat and stir into our Spinach & Ricotta fresh tortelloni and finish with a leaf or two of fresh basil for a taste of la vera Italia.
Brand Marketing
Live Life Generously
Our family has been making fresh pasta for Italian dinner tables since 1962 in our home in Verona. Now, we present the perfect accompaniment, our Fresh Sauces. Specially made to complement our fresh pasta, our sauces are lovingly prepared with carefully selected ingredients, each of which is perfectly cooked to bring you its full flavour and ideal texture.
